mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total FROM tb_order WHERE status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_order
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_vending_machine WHERE vm_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_task WHERE task_status = 1

SELECT s.sku_name, COUNT(o.id) as count FROM tb_sku s LEFT JOIN tb_channel c ON s.sku_id = c.sku_id LEFT JOIN tb_order o ON c.inner_code = o.inner_code WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY s.sku_id, s.sku_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updateTime, t.addr, t.inner_code FROM tb_task t WHERE t.task_status = 3 ORDER BY t.update_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_task WHERE task_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_task WHERE task_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_task WHERE task_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_sku
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sku_id) FROM tb_channel WHERE current_capacity < 10

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN vm_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as online, SUM(CASE WHEN vm_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as offline, SUM(CASE WHEN vm_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as maintenance, SUM(CASE WHEN vm_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as error FROM tb_vending_machine

SELECT id, CASE WHEN vm_status = 0 THEN CONCAT('设备 ', inner_code, ' 已离线') WHEN vm_status = 3 THEN CONCAT('设备 ', inner_code, ' 发生故障') ELSE '系统告警' END as message, CASE WHEN vm_status = 0 OR vm_status = 3 THEN 'danger' ELSE 'warning' END as variant FROM tb_vending_machine WHERE vm_status IN (0, 3) ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT t.task_id as id, t.`desc` as title, t.user_name as assignee, CASE WHEN t.create_type = 3 THEN 'high' WHEN t.create_type = 1 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END as priority FROM tb_task t LEFT JOIN tb_emp e ON t.user_id = e.id WHERE t.task_status = 1 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.sku_id as id, s.sku_name as name, COALESCE(SUM(c.current_capacity), 0) as stock, COALESCE(SUM(c.max_capacity), 0) as maxStock FROM tb_sku s LEFT JOIN tb_channel c ON s.sku_id = c.sku_id GROUP BY s.sku_id, s.sku_name ORDER BY stock ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT e.id as id, e.user_name as name, e.image, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as tasksCompleted, COALESCE(COUNT(t.task_id), 0) as totalTasks FROM tb_emp e LEFT JOIN tb_task t ON e.id = t.user_id WHERE e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.id, e.user_name, e.image LIMIT 5

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalRevenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.7, 0) as totalCosts, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.3, 0) as netProfit, '30%' as profitMargin FROM tb_order o

SELECT 'Inventory' as category, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.45, 0) as amount, 45 as percentage, 'primary' as variant FROM tb_order o UNION ALL SELECT 'Maintenance' as category, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.24, 0) as amount, 24 as percentage, 'warning' as variant FROM tb_order o UNION ALL SELECT 'Operations' as category, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.18, 0) as amount, 18 as percentage, 'default' as variant FROM tb_order o UNION ALL SELECT 'Personnel' as category, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) * 0.13, 0) as amount, 13 as percentage, 'secondary' as variant FROM tb_order o

SELECT n.node_id as id, n.node_name as name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as revenue FROM tb_node n LEFT JOIN tb_vending_machine vm ON n.node_id = vm.node_id LEFT JOIN tb_order o ON vm.inner_code = o.inner_code GROUP BY n.node_id, n.node_name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT p.partner_id as id, p.partner_name as name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as revenue, CONCAT(ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM tb_order WHERE status = 2), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') as roi FROM tb_partner p LEFT JOIN tb_vending_machine vm ON p.partner_id = vm.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_order o ON vm.inner_code = o.inner_code GROUP BY p.partner_id, p.partner_name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN vm_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 1) as machineUptime, 2.3 as uptimeTrend, ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 2 THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.inner_code), 0)), 0) as revenuePerMachine, 8.5 as rpmTrend, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 1) as taskCompletionRate, 5.2 as taskTrend, 4.5 as customerSatisfaction, 1.2 as csatTrend FROM tb_vending_machine vm LEFT JOIN tb_order o ON vm.inner_code = o.inner_code LEFT JOIN tb_task t ON 1=1
